## Contact Information

- **Location:** AinTalh, Nouakchott North, Mauritania

---

## Professional Summary
Expert blending Corporate Finance, Accounting, Fintech, and Software Engineering. Focused on financial data analysis, project management, feasibility studies, and integrating custom software systems to optimize organizational workflows.

---

## Startup Ventures & Products

### 1. The Accounting House (دار المحاسبة)
- **Role:** Founder (June 2025 - Present)
- **Type:** Advisory & Accounting firm
- **Services:** Accounting, corporate taxation mapping, financial audits, advisory, and compliance.

### 2. Errayd (الرايد)
- **Type:** ERP Integrated Management Software Product
- **Target Audience:** Small & Medium Businesses, Banks, Insurance companies.
- **Capabilities:** Manages Human Resources, payroll cycles, double-entry accounting ledger flows, assets, stock inventories, and specialized transaction tracking.

---

## Work Experience

### 1. Regional Supervisor
- **Employer:** Ministry of Youth Empowerment & National Gendarmerie
- **Duration:** Oct 2025 - Dec 2025
- **Description:** Supervised youth activities, student protection program coordination, and drug abuse prevention schemes in collaboration with the National Anti-Narcotics Division.

### 2. Partnerships & Collaboration Supervisor
- **Employer:** Noujoum Mauritania Sarl
- **Duration:** June 2025 - Sept 2025
- **Description:** Managed inter-company sports and institutional partnerships, oversaw sports-tech logistics and project setups.

### 3. Banking Supervision Division Intern
- **Employer:** Central Bank of Mauritania (BCM)
- **Duration:** July 2024 - Sept 2024
- **Description:** Assessed stability indexes, logged reporting data from local banks, and compiled risk management recommendations for supervisory boards.

### 4. Board Member (Student Representative)
- **Institution:** Higher Institute of Accounting and Business Administration (ISCAE)
- **Duration:** April 2024 - May 2025
- **Description:** Student representative on the Board of Directors, participated in budget reviews, program upgrades, and administrative audits.
